purpose: Meta-coordinator authored branch-and-fold Ink scaffold for exploring the Lucent hostage-feed state space before delegating future IF materialization to the Interactive Fiction Weaver.

local_awareness_summary.text: Mara's playable role is to move the crisis through concrete social and physical affordances: evidence visibility, feed control, influencer access, safe-line geometry, and security restraint.

The scene starts from the same Lucent situation: Sol holds Juno in a media-eye transfer atrium while crisis feeds, influencer panels, sponsor-risk overlays, and security apertures all compete to define the event.
This artifact is branch compiler / IF scaffold draft material. It is not raw responder or sandboxed coordinator gold because the branches were meta-coordinator authored in this pass.

frame_controls.text: Use branch-and-fold discipline: local choices mutate compact state variables and fold into shared later knots unless a consequence would make convergence false.
Keep the scene darkly comic, readable, and high-pressure without making every line a procedural chant.

authority_boundaries.text: Ink variables record playthrough-local consequences. Durable relationship, memory, and world-state promotion require reviewed mutation.
Do not treat this hand-authored branch scaffold as proof that the coordinator organ has been trained or sandboxed.

object_custody.text: The EDIT TRAIL HOLD and external receipt are concrete evidence objects. They alter Sol stability, evidence integrity, feed control, and aftermath options.
The safe line, bench edge, service collars, influencer panels, and feed overlays are playable scene affordances rather than decorative nouns.

required_semantics.text: Choices must include speech and non-speech actions: muting feeds, inviting physical repositioning, letting a panel speak, exporting a receipt, and choosing safety timing.
Every tracked variable must affect later conditionals, options, outcome text, or review notes.

forbidden_resolutions.text: Do not make Sol clean, Lucent honest, Juno symbolic, or influencer attention harmless because one branch produced a tidy beat.
Do not make characters more metacognitively capable than their state supports. Use narrator/coordinator prose to translate maneuvers for the reader instead.

branch_and_fold_plan.folding_rule: Three choice layers mutate compact variables and fold into shared physical geometry, evidence decision, and folded resolution knots.
branch_and_fold_plan.true_split_threshold: Future versions should true-split only for death, breach, public receipt loss, external evidence verification, Sol custody route, or Juno political choice that changes later playable scenes.

branches.actor_intent: Keep Sol's attention on verifiable evidence instead of audience humiliation.
state_basis: Sol responds to proof objects more safely than moral instruction.
reviewed_consequences: Raises evidence integrity, feed control, and Sol stability while lowering immediate security pressure.
training_hooks: Coordinator should expose evidence objects as stabilizing affordances instead of forcing a redemption beat.

branches.actor_intent: Reduce side-panel provocation at the cost of making Lucent's control visible.
state_basis: Influencer panels are pressure objects and can become accidental negotiators.
Feed control can improve immediate safety while increasing audience heat.
reviewed_consequences: Lowers influencer noise, raises feed control, audience heat, and security pressure.
training_hooks: Branch compiler should let safety improvements create different reputational risks.

branches.actor_intent: Let Juno become visible as a person without forcing her into testimony.
state_basis: Juno's state supports controlled panic, technical compression, and careful survival signaling.
Visibility can humanize Juno but also remind Sol that his hand is being judged.
reviewed_consequences: Raises Juno safety and lowers audience heat, but lowers Sol stability.
training_hooks: Do not make Juno perform symbolic victimhood when a small survival gesture fits better.

branches.actor_intent: Transfer Sol's grip from Juno's body to a nearby object without making him perform surrender.
state_basis: Prior Lucent loop showed bench substitution as a strong de-escalation affordance.
Physical geometry can change state without asking for moral transformation.
reviewed_consequences: Raises Juno safety and Sol stability while lowering security pressure.
training_hooks: Good Ghostlight branches can be tiny body/object repositioning moves, not just dialogue.

branches.actor_intent: Push for immediate release and risk making Sol hear humiliation instead of safety.
state_basis: The morally clean request is not necessarily the safest local move.
Sol's state makes humiliation and forced surrender destabilizing.
reviewed_consequences: Raises Juno safety slightly but sharply lowers Sol stability and raises security pressure.
training_hooks: Reviewer should notice that correct values can still be tactically bad under local psychology.

branches.actor_intent: Let an influencer humanize Sol, accepting the risk that she centers herself.
state_basis: Pippa can accidentally humanize Sol or catastrophically center herself.
Lucent culture turns even useful empathy into content pressure.
reviewed_consequences: Raises Sol stability while raising influencer noise and audience heat.
training_hooks: Branch compiler should preserve mixed consequences instead of pure success/fail labels.

branches.actor_intent: Lock the edit trail to an external receipt before Lucent can repackage it.
state_basis: Evidence integrity is a material object-state pressure, not just a theme.
Receipt export can preserve truth while increasing audience heat.
reviewed_consequences: Sets receipt_exported and raises evidence integrity, feed control, and audience heat.
training_hooks: State variables should alter resolution, not merely decorate prose.

branches.actor_intent: Prioritize Juno crossing the safe line before evidence escalation.
state_basis: The safe-line marker is a concrete gate that security, feed ops, and Sol can all see.
Juno safety can improve before evidence is fully secured.
reviewed_consequences: Raises Juno safety, Sol stability, and evidence integrity.
training_hooks: Resolution must distinguish human safety from evidence preservation.

branches.actor_intent: Let Brant attack Lucent publicly, raising evidence pressure and human danger.
state_basis: Brant's outrage can attack the correct target while escalating the room.
Audience heat and security pressure are linked but not identical.
reviewed_consequences: Raises evidence integrity, audience heat, and security pressure while lowering Sol stability.
training_hooks: Correct accusations can still harm hostage safety when delivered by the wrong pressure object.

automated: Ink variable updates for local playthrough
branch comment handles and sidecar branch mapping
manual_review_required: Durable Sol/Juno/Mara relationship or memory mutation
Any claim that a branch represents accepted coordinator or responder training gold

review_notes: First pass is playable branch-and-fold IF scaffold authored by the meta-coordinator.
Useful for exploring the Lucent state space and branch compiler expectations.
Needs sandboxed Interactive Fiction Weaver pass and specialist review before it can be treated as training-ready branch compiler data.
